recommendations.title: The Wailer
recommendations.overview: On their way to Mexico, six students are stranded in a small town where years before a tragedy took place.

recommendations.title: Hell and Back
recommendations.overview: Two best friends set out to rescue their pal after he's accidentally dragged to hell.

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Guanajuato Mummies
recommendations.overview: Three friends confront a horde of mummies, who have inexplicably awakened, and try to rescue their pal, not realizing they have fallen into a trap.

recommendations.title: Instructions Not Included
recommendations.overview: Valentin is Acapulco's resident playboy, until a former fling leaves a baby on his doorstep and him heading with her out of Mexico.

recommendations.title: The Shop Around the Corner
recommendations.overview: Two employees at a gift shop can barely stand one another, without realising that they are falling in love through the post as each other's anonymous pen pal.

recommendations.title: Vacation Friends
recommendations.overview: When a straight-laced couple that has fun with a rowdy couple on vacation in Mexico return to the States, they discover that the crazy couple they met in Mexico followed them back home and decide to play tricks on them.

recommendations.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run
recommendations.overview: When his best friend Gary is suddenly snatched away, SpongeBob takes Patrick on a madcap mission far beyond Bikini Bottom to save their pink-shelled pal.

recommendations.title: Doug's 1st Movie
recommendations.overview: Doug and his pal Skeeter set's out to find the monster of Lucky Duck Lake. Though things get really out of hand when some one blurts out that the monster is real.

recommendations.title: Murder Mystery 2
recommendations.overview: After starting their own detective agency, Nick and Audrey Spitz land a career-making case when their billionaire pal is kidnapped from his wedding.

recommendations.title: The Terminal
recommendations.overview: An Eastern European tourist unexpectedly finds himself stranded in JFK airport, and must take up temporary residence there.
